title: Implement Product Canonical Entity with Repository Pattern
description: Complete the MoneyWorks canonical entity set by implementing the Product entity with full parity to Name and Tax Rate entities. This includes canonical type definitions preserving exact MoneyWorks field names (StockCode, Description, SellPrice, CostPrice, etc.), branded types for type safety, complete field metadata with validation rules, and a ProductRepository extending BaseMoneyWorksRepository with read-only queries and specialized query methods. The implementation must support multi-format exports (compact, compact-headers, full, schema) and follow the established field-discovery pattern using XML to determine field structure since TSV lacks headers.
why: Products are one of the core MoneyWorks entities essential for completing the canonical domain model. They're required for transaction creation, product catalog management, and pricing operations. Completing this entity set provides full coverage of primary MoneyWorks tables, enabling comprehensive accounting integrations and unlocking downstream features like purchase order generation, inventory tracking, and sales forecasting.

tasks.title: Implement Product enums (ProductType, Status, Flags)
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/enums.ts with MoneyWorks canonical enumerations. Include ProductType enum for stock vs kit vs labour, Status enum for active/discontinued/obsolete, and bit-mapped Flags enum for NonStock, Discontinued, Kit product classifications. Must follow MoneyWorks manual for exact values.

tasks.title: Implement Product canonical types (MoneyWorksProduct interface)
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/types.ts defining complete MoneyWorksProduct interface with exact MoneyWorks field names (StockCode, Description, SellPrice, CostPrice, Unit, Category, Location, etc.). Include ProductCode branded type reference from utilities. Add MoneyWorksProductInput and MoneyWorksProductFilter types following Name entity pattern.

tasks.title: Implement Product field metadata and definitions
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/fields.ts with complete field metadata for all Product fields. Define MoneyWorksProductField interface including fieldName, dataType (T/N/D/B/S), maxLength, description, required flag, indexed status, relatedEntity, and validationRules. Provide helper functions like getProductField(), getRequiredProductFields(), and getIndexedProductFields().

tasks.title: Implement Product validator functions
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/validators.ts with business rule validators: validateProduct() for complete validation, validateProductCode() for stock code format, validatePricing() for price constraints, checkProductStatus() for active/discontinued logic. Include helper predicates like isKit(), isNonStock(), and calculation functions like getProductMargin(). Follow ValidationResult and ValidationError patterns from Name validators.

tasks.title: Create ProductRepository base class with CRUD preparation
tasks.description: Create packages/data/src/repositories/product.repository.ts extending BaseMoneyWorksRepository<MoneyWorksProduct>. Implement protected prepare() method for converting typed data to MoneyWorks format (numeric formatting, boolean handling). Implement protected postProcess() method for adding branded types and converting MoneyWorks format to typed format. Handle numeric field coercion and string-to-boolean conversion.

tasks.title: Implement read-only repository base operations
tasks.description: In ProductRepository, implement inherited read-only methods with proper MoneyWorks integration: findByKey(stockCode) using StockCode primary key with exact match, findAll(params) for retrieving all products with pagination support, find(search?, params?) for MoneyWorks search expressions. Ensure proper error handling, null return for missing products, and mock mode fallback. All methods should leverage client.smartExport().

tasks.title: Implement specialized product query methods
tasks.description: In ProductRepository, add specialized query methods: getActiveProducts() for non-discontinued items, getByCategory(category) for category filtering, getByLocation(location) for stock location filtering, getKitProducts() for kit-type products, getNonStockProducts() for non-stock items, search(text, options) for full-text search, getByPricingLevel(level) for pricing level filtering, and getWithCurrentCosts() for products with cost information. All should use find() internally with appropriate MoneyWorks search syntax.

tasks.title: Integrate multi-format export support
tasks.description: Ensure ProductRepository supports all export formats through client.smartExport() integration: compact (raw arrays), compact-headers (arrays with field headers), full (complete objects), and schema (includes metadata and field descriptions). This should work automatically through the base repository's smartExport() support without needing explicit format handling in ProductRepository.

tasks.title: Implement field discovery integration
tasks.description: Verify ProductRepository integrates with field discovery pattern. Confirm client.smartExport() automatically handles XML export for Product table structure discovery, TSV parsing, and field ordering caching. No explicit changes needed if base client already handles this, but verify the implementation works correctly for Product entity and document any Product-specific behavior.

tasks.title: Create barrel exports and canonical terminology constants
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/index.ts as barrel export file. Export all types, enums, field definitions, validators from respective modules. Add MW_PRODUCT_TERMS constant object exporting canonical MoneyWorks terminology for products (e.g., STOCK_CODE, DESCRIPTION, SELL_PRICE, COST_PRICE, UNIT, CATEGORY, LOCATION). Follow the pattern from names/index.ts.

tasks.title: Write comprehensive unit tests for ProductRepository
tasks.description: Create packages/data/src/repositories/product.repository.test.ts with comprehensive test coverage: verify findByKey returns correct product and null for invalid codes, findAll respects pagination parameters, all specialized query methods filter correctly with valid search syntax, numeric field type conversions work properly, boolean field parsing functions correctly, branded types are applied in postProcess, error handling for malformed data, and mock mode fallback when MoneyWorks client unavailable. Use real MoneyWorks product data structure in tests.

tasks.title: Verify type safety with TypeScript compiler
tasks.description: Run TypeScript compiler (bun run typecheck) on entire canonical and data packages to verify: all Product fields are strongly typed with no 'any' casts, branded types (ProductCode, etc.) are correctly applied and prevent type misuse, MoneyWorksProduct interface correctly extends field metadata structure, all enums are properly used in types, validators return correct ValidationResult types, and repository methods have correct async/Promise signatures. Fix any compilation errors.

tasks.title: Update repository package exports
tasks.description: Update packages/data/src/repositories/index.ts to export ProductRepository class and related types. Ensure ProductRepository is available for use in API controllers and other packages consuming the data layer. Follow existing pattern for NameRepository and TaxRateRepository exports.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Canonical types defined with exact MoneyWorks Product field names (StockCode, Description, SellPrice, CostPrice, Unit, Category, Location, etc.) in @moneyworks/canonical/entities/products/types.ts matching ProductCode branded type from utilities
Product enums implemented for ProductType, Status, and other enumerated fields with canonical MW values in enums.ts with bit-mapped flags for Products (e.g., NonStock, Discontinued, Kit)

Complete field metadata in fields.ts defining all Product fields with MoneyWorksProductField interface including: fieldName, dataType (T/N/D/B/S), maxLength, description, required flag, indexed status, relatedEntity, and validationRules

Validator functions in validators.ts implementing: validateProduct() for business rules, validateProductCode() for stock code format, validatePricing() for price constraints, checkProductStatus() for active/discontinued logic, and helper functions like isKit(), isNonStock(), getProductMargin()

ProductRepository in @moneyworks/data/repositories extending BaseMoneyWorksRepository<MoneyWorksProduct> with prepare() and postProcess() methods handling numeric field conversion, boolean parsing, and branded type conversion
Read-only repository operations implemented: findByKey(stockCode), findAll(params), find(search?, params?) supporting MoneyWorks search expressions with proper error handling and mock mode fallback

Specialized query methods implemented: getActiveProducts(), getByCategory(category), getByLocation(location), getKitProducts(), getNonStockProducts(), search(text, options), getByPricingLevel(level), and getWithCurrentCosts()
Multi-format export support for all queries returning: compact (arrays), compact-headers (with headers), full (objects), schema (with metadata) via client.smartExport() integration

Field discovery integration using XML export to dynamically determine Product table structure and field ordering, with TSV parsing following field discovery pattern, caching discovered structure for performance
Barrel exports in index.ts re-exporting types, enums, field definitions, validators, and repository with MW_PRODUCT_TERMS constant for canonical terminology (e.g., STOCK_CODE, SELL_PRICE, COST_PRICE)

Unit tests in product.repository.test.ts covering: findByKey returns correct product, findAll respects pagination, specialized queries filter correctly, data type conversions work, error handling for invalid codes, and mock mode fallback
Type safety verified with TypeScript compiler - all fields strongly typed with no any casts, branded types prevent misuse, MoneyWorksProduct interface correctly extends from field metadata
